price-series.description: Crude oil spot prices by date and crude type (Brent, WTI, Dubai)

energy-indicators.description: Country oil reserves, production, exports, imports by year

oil-events.description: Oil-related geopolitical events with geocoordinates. Supersedes events.json.

shipping-disruptions.description: Chokepoint and shipping lane disruptions with geo

refinery-outages.description: Refinery and processing facility outages with geo

geopolitical-supply-risk-events.description: Scored geopolitical risk events affecting oil supply chains

events.description: DEPRECATED — use oil-events.json instead. No geo coordinates.

null_convention: null = unknown or unavailable — never use 0 for missing
date_standard: ISO 8601 — YYYY-MM monthly, YYYY-MM-DD daily, integer annual
geo_standard: WGS84 decimal degrees — see GeoCoordinate in types/oil.ts
contact: See data/imports/HUB_CONTRACT.md for full field documentation
